name: codex-3d-asset
description: Pure Codex plugin for shadowless white-background 3D asset references, confirmable direct Tripo API workflows, Codex-delivered local preview links, and selectable download formats.

interface.shortDescription: Generate Tripo-ready reference images in Codex, confirm the handoff, return a local preview link, and choose the download format.
interface.longDescription: Instruction-only Codex plugin for 3D asset workflows. It resolves style, uses native image generation, enforces shadowless white-background references with no floor gradient or ground plane, applies front-view T-pose rules for characters, checks TRIPO_API_KEY before handoff, asks for confirmation before spending Tripo credits unless the user explicitly wants immediate continuation, uses the Tripo API directly instead of browser automation, returns a local viewer link in Codex after previewable downloads, and supports selectable output download formats with glb as the default.
defaultPrompt: Create a low poly knight in a shadowless front-view T-pose on white.
Generate every low poly asset needed for a soccer match and send each one to Tripo.
Use these references to define the style, then continue to the Tripo API and download as FBX.
